Steve

entry.title: Re: Object Information Key
entry.content: Is there a T-code for the Object Info parameters. I am using SAP ECC

entry.title: Hi Guru's , Can any one help me with EWM Production issues .
entry.content:
Hi Guru's ,

Can any one help me with EWM Production issues .

B Regards,

Viswanath

entry.title: Re: Trying to assign (SAPLFACI)BKPF to a field-symbol
entry.content: The assignment trick allows access to global variables of all loaded code areas at runtime. The most likely answer is that Parked documents do not call any logic in the Function Group FACI and so that function group is not loaded at that code branch. You can test this by entering "(SAPLFACI)BKPF" in the debugger to see if that is an active reference for parked documents.

entry.title: Is there a way to hide the call option on the new people profile spotlight?
entry.content:
With the new people profile feature, SAP has added an option to make phone calls from the spotlight screen. We have not integrated  MS.Teams with SF employee central. Without the Teams integration when a user clicks on the call button, system shows an error message " Sorry, we're unable to complete the call". 

This will cause employees to raise tickets. Is there a way to hide the 'Call' option on the spotlight? If not, will it be a future enhancement?

entry.title: Re: Delta not pulled for Z fields in 2LIS_02_ITM - Urgent
entry.content:
Hello Krishna,

Can you kindly provide a sample of code for EXIT_SAPLEINS_001?
I am facing the same issue with some custom fields on which the delta does not get reflected.

Kind regards,
Alex

entry.title: Re: SAP Kyma environment ready for Production?
entry.content: Additional information. The Network Policy appears to be the issue. If I remove the Policy created in the Deployment YAML, reverting the behavior to basically wide open, then it works. But looking at the Network Policies documentation, everything looks correct. I verified that the istio-system namespace does indeed have a name: istio-system in its definition. The istio-ingressgateway POD has app: istio-ingressgateway defined. So for some reason the Policy is not matching.

entry.title: Re: Organize and categorize your documentation in SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Will we have the ability as part of the different document types to present the users with a template that they fill in, similar to our different document types today in 7.2?

entry.title: Re: SAP Kyma environment ready for Production?
entry.content: Sigh. Out of the box, the istio-system namespace does NOT have a label called name: It is just part of the metadata. I added "name: istio-system" to the labels section for namespace istio-system and now the Policy works fine.

entry.title: Re: SAP CodeJam Roadshow 2024 - Latin America edition 🇧🇷 🇨🇱 🇦🇷 🇨🇴 (August 8th - 21st 2024)
entry.content:
How can we register to the Road Show in Argentina?

Thanks,

Germán.

entry.title: 2LIS_02_ITM custom fields delta not working properly S/4HANA
entry.content:
Greetings SAP experts,

I know that this topic was raised a lot of times before, but many topics are outdated, the links are not working anymore, or I could simply not understand the solution shared.

We are currently facing some delta issues with some custom fields which were enhanced in 2LIS_02_ITM extractor via RSU5_SAPI_BADI by a previous team. The changes do not get reflected properly.

While reading plenty of posts around the community I found out about EXIT_SAPLRSAP_001 and EXIT_SAPLEINS_001 customer exits. This might be the key, but I am not sure about the code which should be implemented.

Can someone explain in dummy details which exit should be used in order to make the delta work for our custom fields and share a sample of code which can be further adapted for each field?

I really appreciate your support and I am sorry if I missed any post which could help. I passed through everything which I found out but still didn't understand how to make it work.

The source system is S/4HANA 2022.

 

Please help!

Kind regards,

Alex

entry.title: Re: Task 7 - Using CQL in an unbound function implementation (July Developer Challenge - "Rever
entry.content:
@gphadnis2000  Took the liberty of submitting to your service as well as submitting to the testserver from postman, hope that that doesn't cause too much confusion.

{
  "@odata.context": "$metadata#Edm.String",
  "value": "Queso Cabrales by Cooperativa de Quesos 'Las Cabras'"
}
N.B. the response is Product Name, "by" and the Company Name.

entry.title: Error F5787 & items have not been activated due to inconsistent withholding tax info
entry.content:
Long Text of Error shows

Short Text

& items have not been activated due to inconsistent withholding tax info

Diagnosis

The open items display different withholding tax information from the relevant business partner master record. For example, the number of withholding tax types in the open item could differ from the number of withholding tax types in the master record.

System Response

Items are not activated.

Procedure

Change the withholding tax data for the open item in question.

 

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Error F5787 & items have not been activated due to in...
entry.content: Follow the steps of kba  2681301 - To adjust the inconsistent withholding tax information in the invoice document

entry.title: Re: Luxury Car Depreciation
entry.content: Test

entry.title: Re: How to get started with Business Process Management?
entry.content: Interesting topic and good to see the Business side detailed. Cant wait to see the next blog

entry.title: Optimist
entry.content:
It was not easy to be Early Talent at SAP, 25 years ago, let alone any company with no experience and not from IITS/ BITS. It was the first attempt from SAP to hire from Bangalore University campus and conducted an interview at an engineering college. When they knew few MCA post graduates also were part of the test, they made sure to write it on the form, that may not consider those candidates. The placement officer wanted to give oppurtunity to engineering graduates than MCA coming from another college. 

Though I was in this unfortunate category, I gave my best shot in the test and fortunately got selected for the interview.

One of the questions in the interview was focusing on this aspect, why did I attempt the test against all odds ? I replied that I am optimist in life,  do my best and hope for the rest.

This is what has kept me going at SAP 😊

entry.title: Re: SAP Security Authorization Trace & Checks
entry.content:
Hi

The screenshot do not open. Can you please reaload?

 

Brara786

entry.title: Re: Sales Invoice Accounting Entries
entry.content: Did you implement this change and what was the solution.

entry.title: Re: Value of Stock (BSX) in Goods Receipt for Purchase Orders with Negative Stocks
entry.content: Very Helpful! Thanks @Cirlei_Guedes

entry.title: Re: SE16N and working with from - to values
entry.content:
As a recovering DBA, I always thought '%' was 0 or more characters, and '_' was 1 character only, as wild card options at the SQL layer. An asterisk "*' was not a wild card. SE16 may differ though I can't check myself.

A '*' character sorts before upper case characters in ASCII, which may explain your results.

entry.title: SAP Public Cloud Communication with UK and PT tax authorities
entry.content:
I have a Brazilian customer that has two others plants, one in UK and the other in PT and needs the invoice documents to be forwarded to the tax agencies in real time, for a public project, what would be the suggestion, since the customeralready has already a system that generates invoice and communicates with the authorities. Do you suggest an API is made with a sales document in SAP that generates an invoice in the legacy system and does the latter communicate with the tax agency and return the invoice in SAP or does SAP Public delivers everything directly using DRC?

In terms of time and work, what would be the suggestion?

Remembering that it is a public project and we only have 2 months to complete.

entry.title: SAP Developer News, July 25th, 2024
entry.content:
Podcast Version: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2024/07/25/sap-developer-news-july-25th-2024/

DESCRIPTION

ABAP CDS TechByte Series

  • ABAP CDS TechBytes – https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQC3HBShmlMaPu_nL--4f20z

SAP Build Code July Updates

  • Product Updates for SAP Build Code – July 2024 Edition https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/product-updates-for-sap-build-code-july-2024-edition/ba-p/13764559

July Developer Challenge reminder

  • Blog post (containing links to each of the tasks) https://community.sap.com/t5/application-development-blog-posts/july-developer-challenge-quot-reverse-apis-quot/ba-p/13749653

UI5 Tooling 4.0 and Code Connect recordings:

  • UI5 Tooling 4.0: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/ui5-tooling-4-0/ba-p/13769578
  • reCAP Recordings: https://recap-conf.dev/
  • ui5Con Recordings: https://openui5.org/ui5con/germany2024/
  • ABAPConf Recordings: https://abapconf.org/abapconfeurope2024/

CAP #GoodToKnow Shorts Series

  • Modeling many-to-many associations #SAPCAP #GoodToKnow – YouTube https://www.youtube.com/shorts/yGg3YD1weIA
  • Series Playlist: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL6RpkC85SLQDZ18v94otZSJJrpcNkPPV9

================================================

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro

0:10 ABAP CDS TechByte Series

1:01 SAP Build Code July Updates

2:48 July Developer Challenge reminder

3:58 UI5 Tooling 4.0 and Code Connect recordings

4:55 CAP #GoodToKnow Shorts Series 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Shilpa] Hello SAP developers, I'm sure by now you would have seen the new TechByte series on ABAP Core Data Services. If not, here's a quick recap. Myself and developer advocate Sheena will walk you through the basics of ABAP CDS, covering the overview and key functionality, how a virtual element with complex logic can be created, extend a CDS View Entity, restrict the data authorizations using CDS Access Control, govern the quality of CDS Views using unit test, and troubleshooting tools available to analyze the data of CDS Views. I will leave the link to the ten-part videos in the description. Not just that, the advanced features of ABAP CDS will be coming up, so stay tuned.

[Thomas] First shipped earlier this year, we have the introduction of SAP Build Code. This is the AI-powered latest version of SAP's development environment based upon the SAP Business Application Studio. This month we see enhancements to SAP Build Code, many of which are based right upon your feedback from initial use of Build Code. Most of the enhancements focus on the Joule AI integration.

First of all, we've made it easier to get to the Joule Assistant from within the storyboard and the graphical navigation tools of the CAP designer itself. The part that I'm most excited about is originally Joule integration in SAP Build Code was really focused on creating new CAP entities. So very useful when you're first starting your project. But we've heard your feedback and we've added a lot of new functionality that also lets you alter an existing CAP data model. So you can add new entities, add or remove associations, and make these changes to an existing model all using the same AI assistant that you've been using to start your projects. In addition to this major enhancement for the AI capabilities, we also see the addition of a guided assistant for Fiori development as well as a new graphical HDBGrants editor as well. So be sure to check out all the latest enhancements to SAP Build Code with the link in the show notes to the blog post that details them.

[DJ] The SAP Developer Challenge this month is well on the way. The challenge is called Reverse APIs, and it's all about you creating, creating CAP-based services and API endpoints for us to call and validate. We're about three quarters of the way through the challenge. There are 12 tasks altogether. So it sounds about right for this time of the month. So far, we've been digging into defining and implementing actions and functions in a couple of simple services across the REST protocol and the OData protocol adapters. And now we're moving more into a sort of Northwind-based service scenario, where we can try and flex our Odata muscles a bit more. It's not too late to get started. There's plenty of discussion and help in the SAP Community Platform for each of the tasks. So what are you waiting for? Head over to the SAP Community. The blog post link is in the description and get going.

[Nico] Hi everyone, and welcome to the SAP Developer News. The UI5 team just released version four of the UI5 tooling, which comes with some handy new features as well as paving the road for UI5 version 2.x, which is still in the works, but hopefully available soon. One of the new features is that the tooling can now generate the supported locales property of the manifest.json. So no more ugly 404s in production. Check out the blog post linked in the description for more information. On a related note, we would like to point our attention to the recordings of {CodeConnect}. They're now available on YouTube. So for UI5Con, reCAP, and ABAPConf, there are a lot of recordings available so you can check out the sessions on YouTube in your own time. Use the summer break wisely. All right, hope to see you soon, and bye.

[Thomas] I wanted to draw your attention to the recent series of YouTube Shorts, all with the tag #GoodToKnow. These are created by our fellow developer advocate, DJ Adams, and look at the basics of the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model. They do it in short 60-second chunks, and all formatted for easy consumption on a mobile device. This makes it easy to learn on the go, or just for those of you looking for some basic, but great CAP knowledge that you can consume in small, bite-sized chunks. In the most recent episode, DJ talks about many-to-many associations in the Cloud Application Programming Model. It's a concept that I thought would be difficult to explain and understand in 60 seconds, but DJ does a perfect job of it. So be sure to check out that latest video and the entire Good to Know series if you wanna learn more about the SAP Cloud Application Programming Model.

entry.title: Can we create a file as TAB delimited via Open Hub and store in AL11?
entry.content: Can we create a file as TAB delimited via Open Hub and store in AL11?We dont want to create a , or ; delimited File and then use a Program to make it tab delimited,due to the data corruption risk.

entry.title: Data on the report of the in-progress Calibration sessions is missing
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are using Talent Module and we want to create a report on the in-progress sessions of the calibration module.

We created one such report and when testing, we observed that the day on day basis, the data employee data exists on the report but the ratings fall off and they are showing as blank even those employees have data on the calibration sessions.

Any of the customers observed this behavior?

We raised an incident with support team but no resolution yet.

Appreciate any other customers' inputs on this.

Best Regards.

entry.title: Re: How to get started with Business Process Management?
entry.content:
To give a SAP Signavio specific point of view...

I'm part of the SAP Signavio global SSA team as the North American lead.

I've worked with Taryn at many customers over the last couple years for assessing, road mapping and establishing a Center of Excellence for BPM.  It's a key point to anchor customers for adoption such that BPM becomes a part of enterprise DNA.

Every customer I've worked with using this framework has been happy with the results.  The documentation is complete, easy to understand and tuned per customer after a small engagement.

If a customer is using SAP Signavio, and doesn't have a mature BPM or one familiar with SAP Signavio, I highly recommend this BPM framework.

entry.title: Pysical inventory document creation for product not assigned to warehouse/plant
entry.content:
Hi,

A user accidentally created an inventory document via the transaction /scwm/pi_create for a product that did not exist in the plant and warehouse.

When booking the difference in the difference analyzer, a queue was created with the message that the product was not active in the plant.
I was wondering if there is a setting that does not allow the user to enter a product upon creation of an inventory document that is not active for the warehouse in which they are working?

Many thanks for your answers!

Best regards,

Michaël

entry.title: Re: SAP Kyma environment ready for Production?
entry.content:
Let me consolidate this down for anyone else looking for the solution. 

Tutorial Name: Deploy a Node.js Application in the Kyma Runtime
Tutorial URL: https://developers.sap.com/tutorials/deploy-nodejs-application-kyma.html 

Error: 

upstream connect error or disconnect/reset before headers. retried and the latest reset reason: connection timeout

Fixed Step 7: Deployment Description File:

---
apiVersion: gateway.kyma-project.io/v1beta1
kind: APIRule
metadata:
  labels:
    app: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
    release: multitenancy
  name: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
spec:
  gateway: kyma-gateway.kyma-system.svc.cluster.local
  host: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
  rules:
  - accessStrategies:
    - handler: allow
    methods:
    - GET
    - POST
    - PUT
    - PATCH
    - DELETE
    - HEAD
    path: /.*
  service:
    name: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
    port: 8080

---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  labels:
    app: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
    release: multitenancy
  name: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
      release: multitenancy
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
        release: multitenancy
    spec:
      imagePullSecrets:
        - name: <registry-secret> # replace with your own registry secret
      containers:
      - env:
        - name: PORT
          value: "8080"
        - name: TMPDIR
          value: /tmp
        image: <docker-hub-account>/multitenant-kyma-backend:v1  # replace with your Docker Hub account name
        name: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
        ports:
        - name: http
          containerPort: 8080
          protocol: TCP
        livenessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /
            port: http
        readinessProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /
            port: http
        startupProbe:
          httpGet:
            path: /
            port: http
          failureThreshold: 15
          periodSeconds: 2
        resources:
          limits:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 256M
          requests:
            cpu: 100m
            memory: 256M
        securityContext:
          allowPrivilegeEscalation: false
          capabilities:
            drop:
            - ALL
          privileged: false
          runAsNonRoot: true
          readOnlyRootFilesystem: false
        volumeMounts:
        - mountPath: /tmp
          name: tmp
      volumes:
      - emptyDir: {}
        name: tmp

---
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  creationTimestamp: null
  labels:
    app: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
    release: multitenancy
  name: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
spec:
  ports:
  - port: 8080
    protocol: TCP
    targetPort: 8080
  selector:
    app: kyma-multitenant-node-multitenancy
    release: multitenancy
status:
  loadBalancer: {}

---
apiVersion: networking.k8s.io/v1
kind: NetworkPolicy
metadata:
  creationTimestamp: null
  labels:
    release: multitenancy
  name: multitenancy
spec:
  ingress:
  - from:
    - namespaceSelector:
        matchLabels:
          kubernetes.io/metadata.name: istio-system
      podSelector:
        matchLabels:
          app: istio-ingressgateway
  podSelector:
    matchLabels:
      release: multitenancy
  policyTypes:
  - Ingress

If you dig deep enough into the kubernetes documentation on Network Polices you find the reason and the solution. 

https://kubernetes.io/docs/concepts/services-networking/network-policies/#targeting-a-namespace-by-its-name

entry.title: Re: Not able to consume Datasphere objects in sac in data...

Can you please consider updating "Azure AD" by its new name "Entra ID" (https://www.microsoft.com/en-us/security/business/identity-access/microsoft-entra-id).

Thanks,
Marcelo (SAP ECS CAE T&A expert for LAC region)

entry.title: Can we download the .mtar file from the SAP Cloud Transport Management Service?
entry.content:
Hi,
I have integrated Cloud Transport Management into my job inside the SAP CI/CD Service.
I want to download the .mtar file. How can i do that?

Thanks,
Abhinav

entry.title: ODP DTP: "Package 000001 has not been extracted yet and therefore cannot be read again"
entry.content:
I have created 10 DTPs for an ODP ECC extractor using non overlapping selections.  The initializations load successfully, but after the first set of Deltas, only one DTP is successful and the others fail with the following error:

Package 000001 has not been extracted yet and therefore cannot be read again

In ODQMON the subscription view shows the DTPs, but the selection for each one looks like they are all merged together

AUFNR BETWEEN '000000000000' AND '001005228821' OR
AUFNR BETWEEN '001005228822' AND '001010451374' OR
AUFNR BETWEEN '001010451375' AND '001015671988' OR
AUFNR BETWEEN '001015671989' AND '002001740902' OR
AUFNR BETWEEN '002001740903' AND '002006963959' OR
AUFNR BETWEEN '002006963960' AND '003001525436' OR
AUFNR BETWEEN '003001525437' AND '007000500490' OR
AUFNR BETWEEN '007000500491' AND '008004417794' OR
AUFNR BETWEEN '008004417795' AND '008009637499' OR
AUFNR BETWEEN '008009637500' AND 'ZZZZZZZZZZZZ'

We are attempting to do this in order to run multiple deltas in parallel.  The previous init/dtp was running very long. 

Any assistance would be greatly appreciated

entry.title: Is there a way to apply a selection from a filter in another filter in SAC?
entry.content:
Is there a way to apply a selection (value) made from a page filter applied in another filter in SAC OVM?

If I select ABC in InputControl 1, I want that same value of ABC applied in InputControl 2.

Thank you!

entry.title: Is it possible to create a business rule for recurring payments that will trigger a workflow?
entry.content:
I need to create a rule that will trigger a workflow for recurring payments and if no scenario is catched raised an error message. 

I have already tried using cross-entity rules with spot bonus, compensation information and compensation models but with no luck.

Please help!

entry.title: Re: Free-hand SQL Webi Promotion to other server, Connect...
entry.content:
add a second/other query within your WebI-report with the correct SQL-source/syntax,
then you can replace/change the source without rebuilding the report.

Does anyone know how to set up this type of connection?

A connection to the application server is working fine, but I can't get a successfully connection for Fiori.

Thank you very much for your support.

entry.title: Re: Task 8 - Responding to an OData query with navigation (July Developer Challenge - "Reverse

The CDS view for Advanced Variant Configuration are not released.

entry.title: Re: Maximize Value with Value Analytics for SAP Ariba
entry.content:
Hi Simon. Amazing blog post, thanks for sharing. I'm working on a POC and my team and I have have few questions that we would like to check with you:

  • Job scheduling BTP service has subscription.
  • Apache 2.0 license clarification
  • BTP deployment process, CAP application usage
  • CDS views overview and Datasphere steps - how the end-to-end process works and if it needs any custom development.

Is it possible to have an overview call with you to check all those details?

Thanks.

Edgy Rodriguez.

entry.title: Re: Cure time/Quarantine time in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi ,

 

In S/4HANA Cloud we have the inspection lot 03 (inspection during production)

but the possibility to specific Quarantine days is not available

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: New or not to the SAP Community, share your story!
entry.content: Hi community! I am so happy to join this group.

entry.title: Re: SAP Community - Where are you from?
entry.content: Hi community! I am so happy to join this group.

entry.title: Screens for document downloading appears bigger in recording
entry.content:
Why when creating a simulation and adding a screen for "SAP GUI Security" the image appears bigger that the other tcodes screens captured.

In "Select Window and Profile" I selected S4 window. Do I need to click somewhere else?

entry.title: COGS revaluation splitting
entry.content:
Do we have option of splitting the COGS revaluation in Actual Costing?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: COGS revaluation splitting
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,


Yes, with Actual Cost Component Delta Split you also have the option of splitting the COGS actual revaluation amount based on the actual cost component delta (difference) split instead of the cost component split for the standard cost estimate.

The actual cost component delta split is the difference between the actual cost component split that was used for the goods issue and the actual cost component split based on the current actual cost estimate.

The COGS actual revaluation amount is then split during the revaluation run that takes place with the Post Closing step after actual costing.

Splitting the Cost of Goods Sold


Best Regards,
SAP Support

entry.title: Re: Takeover Business scenario - Purchase order
entry.content:
Hi,

Your requirements is not clear, what I understand is that you are working on a Migration project from ECC to S4? And you want to migrate the PO that have closed Line items as well as open. If that is the case you need to work with the technical team and provide your data to them from ECC and they will move it to S4 system. That was my experience when I was working on Migrated project 🙂

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: BOR Objects to Event Mesh
entry.content:
Hey experts, good day!

I'm trying to expose to Event Mesh some customer changes using "Connection and Replication Object Customizing" the idea is to have +3 queues and each of them with specific customer changes. This case is Card Payment.

and am using this BOR BUS1186001 Object with "Assigned" event. However, when I assign a card to a customer, nothing happens, I've tried to enhance but nothing is working. I've set up some break point to the program and FM but no result.

I was wondering if it's allowed to use "Assigned" event, because when I've tried different BOR with "Change" is working. Also I could't find any document with this explanation.

Does any have any idea or suggestion to approach with different solution? Otherwise I'll try to call Class instead of BOR

SAP Event Mesh  #CRM

entry.title: Re: hi,i created few vendors,i need to change their Purch...
entry.content:
Hi,

It is already answered in the below thread.

 

Solved: Add in mass purchase organization to vendors - SAP Community

 

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud - How to extend Material Master to 20 digits?
entry.content:
Dear all,

I have received the following question from one of my partners: How to extend the material master to 20 digits, as the current limitation in S/4HANA Public Cloud is 18 digits? 

Some context: the affected customer is engaged with a public sector organization with a fixed naming convention of 20 digits regarding the material master. One of the key requirements is to keep the 20 digits. Are there any possibilities to extend the material master accordingly?

Kind Regards,

Manuel

entry.title: Re: HOW TO GENERATE AN CUSTOMIZED REPORT FOR P2P (PROCURE...
entry.content:
Hi,

Please see the attached screenshot and check with your developer if he can write the same code and you can make changes according to your requirements.

 

Thanks,

entry.title: Re: how to know the requester Department for material res...
entry.content:
Hi,

From MM perspective departments are always defined by Cost centers but in your case, you can use any field in reservation screen and make it mandatory whenever someone is doing reservation, they can add their department name. That's the only work around I can see 🙂 or may be someone else can provide better solution 

Thanks,

Sanan

entry.title: Re: Simple Step-by-Step SAP-Gateway Service Guide
entry.content:
Thank's for the blog, good job-.

Do you know how to get the recive file xml or json?, what kind of method or class i have to invoke?

Regrads.

entry.title: Re: Issue with material dublicates
entry.content:
Hi,

Please check the below link and I hope it will answer your question.

Solved: Prevent creation of duplicate material master reco... - SAP Community

Thanks,

entry.title: How do I create an import declaration in GTS when vendor address is in the US?
entry.content: I have been trying to find a way to issue an import declaration in GTS when the vendor address is in the US, unsuccessfully (tried adding contact party, etc). The only way that I seem to be able to issue an import dec is if the vendor is foreign. We have purchases from US vendors that are sold in ex-works foreign locations all the time, and I am not being able to find a way to issue the import declarations needed to clear those shipments. Would anyone be able to point me in the right direction? I am sure many sales are ex-works foreign locations with US vendors... but can't find any articles about it either.

entry.title: Re: Can the system make a beep/bell sound when there is a...
entry.content: Hi Cristin...I'm getting the beep voice when I use the link send by Tamas. I have uploaded a beep wave sound in /sap/public/XXX folder but it does not beep when I use this link like you mentioned in your comment. Is that working for you when you upload into MIME objects and use that link in flavour scripts?

entry.title: Re: Descriptions not syncing to producer in SEN
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

That doesn't make sense at all.  I've just tested it on my machine and it will definitely downloading the Description from Manager into Producer for Group objects.  Is this a custom attribute or the standard Description field?  If it's the standard Description field, is Producer throwing any other errors.

This should definitely not be an issue so if you are not able to get it running and are using the standard Description attribute, raise a ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-PRO and get someone to take a look.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Unable to generate customized template in SAP Enable...
entry.content:
Hi Sebastian,

Welcome onboard with Enable Now.  If you are interested in generating branded PPT documentation from Enable Now, refer to this video.  The same concepts presented in this video also apply to creating branded Word and PDF documentation.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: SAP Screen Personas and Adapt UI for classic apps are growing in popularity. July 2024 update
entry.content:
It seems like generative AI is on everyone’s mind. This was certainly the case at SAP Sapphire last month. SAP continues to innovate in this area with new AI design patterns appearing across the product portfolio. In my opinion, one factor that’s driving the interest in AI for UX use cases is that people are looking for a fast and easy way to improve the user experience. The good news is that this does not require generative or even “classic” AI. SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition includes a simple and powerful feature to adapt the UI for classic apps. This is also available for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and on-prem customers as SAP Screen Personas.

In this post, I’ll provide a short background on SAP Screen Personas, discuss its implementation as a standard feature in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, and share some interesting usage patterns we are observing. I’ll conclude with some concrete next steps so you can improve the user experience of your SAP ERP system.

SAP Screen Personas / Adapt UI for classic apps lets you simplify screens and streamline business processes

We introduced the first version of SAP Screen Personas in 2012. Fast forward to today and we are on SAP Screen Personas 3.0 SP18. During that time, thousands of customers have simplified their transaction screens. My colleagues and I, along with the customers that attend our monthly practitioner forum calls, have seen a wide variety of UX transformations, ranging from merging content from different tabs or transactions onto a single screen to automating bulk updates that reduce the process time from hours to 30 seconds.

SAP Screen Personas is built into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

SAP Screen Personas was so popular and loved by our customers that we decided to make it a standard feature of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition. Although there are over 3000 SAP Fiori apps available in SAP S/4HANA, there are still some scenarios that lack SAP Fiori coverage. Several thousand classic apps are available to accomplish these less-common tasks. There was already the ability to adapt SAP Fiori apps using SAPUI5 flexibility so we added the new functionality to adapt classic apps using the same menu.

Explosive growth in Adapt UI for classic apps in the past year

Running our software in the cloud gives us better visibility into how customers are using our solutions, which provides insights into adoption patterns. The team and I were pleasantly surprised to see that roughly 20% of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition customers are using the Adapt UI functionality. In fact, we have a 300% increase in the number of flavors running in productive systems within the past year. What are all these customers doing?

What we observed is that public cloud customers are simplifying many of the same apps that their on-prem counterparts do. These tend to be some of the more complex SAP GUI transactions in procurement, sales and distribution, and material handling. Looking deeper, we see that there is also the “long tail” of screen simplifications, with around 175 classic apps having 10 or fewer flavors.

From my perspective, the implications for SAP are clear. For the heavily used flavors, we should probably provide an SAP Fiori app. In some cases, this already exists, and we need to explore why customers are choosing to simplify the classic app rather than using the corresponding SAP Fiori app. (If this is you, please reach out; I would love to hear your explanation.)

Another conclusion I reached from this data is that it was a great idea to include Adapt UI for Classic Apps as a standard feature in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, since so many customers are using it to personalize screens to meet their unique business requirements. It also shows that public cloud customers have lots of flexibility to adapt or extend the user interface and they are using it. SAP Screen Personas is one of several powerful options. Private cloud or on-prem customers have even more extensibility options.

How to improve the user experience of your SAP ERP system

Customers

  • If you are an SAP S/4HANA customer, I recommend you use SAP Fiori apps, whenever possible. You can find the comprehensive list in the SAP Fiori app reference library.
  • For the classic apps, if there is something you don’t like, change it.
  • While SAP Screen Personas is built into SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, it’s a free add-on that takes less than an hour* to install into your private cloud or on-prem system. Then, you can simplify your SAP GUI transactions or classic apps, if you prefer that terminology.
    * if you know what you are doing.

Partners

Learn how Adapt UI for Classic Apps fits into SAP’s UX portfolio and how to use it strategically as part of an SAP S/4HANA transformation or greenfield implementation. The most comprehensive training course on SAP Screen Personas is now on the SAP Learning platform. This training is still free.

Learn more about SAP Screen Personas

  • Online training. The best way to learn the basics about SAP Screen Personas (Adapt UI for classic applications) is to take our course  on the SAP Learning platform. https://learning.sap.com/courses/adapting-the-ui-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-using-sap-screen-personas
  • Connect with your peers. Every other month, we have a group of customers that gather online to share best practices, demo their flavors, and answer each other’s questions. Experts from the product team also join to explain how to use the latest functionality. If you are interested in joining, you can sign up online to join the SAP Screen Personas practitioner forum. This will add you to the mailing list for the monthly meeting summaries. Please contact me directly if you want to join the monthly calls.

I hope you start using Adapt UI for Classic Apps or SAP Screen Personas to make your business users happier and more productive.

For the SAP UX Engineering team, Peter Spielvogel.

entry.title: Re: Screens for document downloading appears bigger in re...
entry.content:
Hi,

I think that the issue that you have is that your Playback Settings are set to maximize the size of the content to fit the screen of the playback device.  In one example, you are playing back a screen image that is almost the same size as the resolution of the screen itself, so there is very little zooming occurring.  However, when you playback the image of the dialogue box, this is very small when compared to your screen resolution so it gets zoomed quite a lot.  It's this setting that is causing this to occur:

If you change that value to Zoom to 100%, you won't see that behaviour.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: How to configure different product cost estimation fo...
entry.content: thanks for your reply. @gafshar_prodea. I have already solved specific problems during implementation

entry.title: Re: Page Refresh - SAP Builder Community Edition
entry.content:
After I get results from an iPhone camera scan of a barcode, I save them in an App variable. I know this works because adding a toast shows me data from the barcode. 
There are many other components on that page that are bound to the App variable. Even though the App variable has changed, the page does not update with the  new content of the App variable. 
if I navigate away from the page then navigate right back the page is update with the content of the App variable as expected. 
I want the page to update immediately after a successful scan.

entry.title: Re: Can the system make a beep/bell sound when there is a...
entry.content:
Hi,

I should mention I am using Slipstream Engine with ECC 6 and not S/4 HANA.

The path in my comment that is "/sap/bc/personas3/resource/" is the path I will follow to reach my resource files that I upload to the Resources area of /PERSONAS/ADMIN.

If you are not on ECC 6 using Slipstream it's possible the path to your resource files is different. Hopefully Tamas can shed some light.

Kindly,

Cristin

entry.title: Re: Can the system make a beep/bell sound when there is a...
entry.content: The path to Resources is the same for Slipstream and webgui / mobgui. I like Cristin's solution of storing the audio file there.

entry.title: Adding custom field in manage manual reservation screen
entry.content:
Dear SAP Experts,

Want to create the custom field in reservation (manage manual reservation tile) screen.

Kindly share the feasibility to create the fields.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Adding custom field in manage manual reservation screen
entry.content:
In app Manage Manual Reservation you can add custom fields at header level using business context "Reservation Document Header" and at item level using business context "Reservation Document Item". Please refer to this online help documentation for your information:

App Extensibility: Manage Manual Reservations
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/32da8359c8ee4e8b8e8c5e15cacba5aa/32c5caa7f06347cb8ed91627addaf7e7.html?locale=en-US

entry.title: Solmanでのテクニカルユーザ変更方法
entry.content:
ご担当者様

Solmanにて設定されているテクニカルユーザ（S**********）を変更したいと考えております。

必要な変更箇所と変更方法をご教示ください。

以上、よろしくお願いいたします。


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Solmanでのテクニカルユーザ変更方法
entry.content:
バックボーンのテクニカルユーザーを変更するために、お手数をおかけしますが、t-code:stc01→新しくSAP_SUPPORT_HUB_CONFIGタスクリストをご作成いただき、

「SAPのサポートバックボーンい対するSM59 HTTP宛先を登録してください。」のステップに新しいテクニカルユーザ＆PWをご入力ください。

以下のWIKIに詳細ステップがありますので、ご参考になれば幸いです。
https://wiki.scn.sap.com/wiki/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=523996872

SAP_SUPPORT_HUB_CONFIGタスクリストが問題なく完成した後に、solman_setup→system preparation→3.2support hub connectivityのステップを再度ご実行いただきますようお願いいたします。

we could not add anything beside the Logo. we would like to add text messages beside the logo. Can you please let us know where to add and how to add beside the logo to the end user login failed page . 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: IAS Login page addition of instruction for user faile...
entry.content:
If you would like to add instructions on logon page, please follow the document:

https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-identity-services/cloud-identity-services/add-instructions-section-on-sign-in-screen

Please note you need to use Horizon theme as explained in the document.

entry.title: Re: Difference Between Asset Acquisition in F0859 and MIR...
entry.content: Thank you so much for your support!!

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408中开放Beta功能测试的AI应用
entry.content:
SAP Beta功能测试项目（SAP Beta Testing Program）旨在于通过客户参与测试来获取真实反馈从而完善Beta功能。客户反馈的详细程度一般涉及产品在设置、可用性、功能和质量方面的问题，以便在产品正式发布（RTC）前进行修正。

Beta测试也有助于让客户提前熟悉最新功能，提高采用率，及提升客户满意度。

Beta测试开放时间一般是在某一产品功能开发完成后，正式发布给客户（RTC）之前。

得益于AI 技术的持续创新，在即将发布的2408版本中，我们将开放非常丰富的AI相关应用的Beta功能测试，让您能够更早地体验最新的技术成果。

财务

AI 辅助错误解决功能(AI-Assisted Error Resolution）

AFC 的 AI 辅助错误解决功能通过生成可理解的错误说明和分步指南，帮助用户更快地解决财务结算流程中的技术错误，从而节省时间并减少与 SAP 支持的交互。

AI 辅助财务业务洞察（AI-Assisted Financial Business Insights: Review Booklet for Cost Centers)

发现成本中心审查手册中的数据意义、突出数据之间的依赖关系，利用自然语言快速解释和汇总洞察，并建议相应的操作。以直观的可视化视图，表格和纯语言形式呈现结果，更轻松的管理报告和注释。

AI 辅助固定资产折旧码注释（AI-assisted Explanation of Fixed Asset Depreciation Keys）

由于复杂的折旧码设置，不同折旧区域的资产价值分析可能会很困难。强大的SAP Business AI可以帮助您解释折旧码的运行方式及其折旧计算系统背后的原理，轻松理解折旧码的配置设置，从而提高资产会计和财务报告的效率和决策质量。

销售

客户退货的对象创建(Assisted Object Creation of Customer Return)

AI辅助的客户退货对象功能旨在帮助客户在创建退货订单的过程中节省时间。当用户输入重复值时, 智能用户界面会根据最有可能的输入值提供推荐。这些推荐值按概率排序，用户可以从提供的推荐值中选择。

项目管理

资源管理：智能匹配员工与项目(Resource Management: Intelligent Matching of Employees to Projects)

通过此功能，资源经理可以更轻松地根据请求和维护的高级技能，搜索、匹配并查找到符合条件的候选人。

用户体验

AI辅助智能汇总(AI-Assisted Smart Summarization)

对使用了SAP Fiori 元素的应用程序中的业务对象页面进行汇总，利用这些汇总快速启动后续操作，例如复制粘贴到邮件等，汇总内容可以根据客户需求翻译成所需语言，不限于系统默认语言。

AI 辅助轻松过滤器(AI-Assisted Easy Filter）

在使用了 SAP Fiori 元素开发的清单报表应用程序中，以自然语言输入筛选条件，获取查询结果，以得到最符合您需求的任何过滤体验。

详情请参阅 Get Involved Early

注册您感兴趣的Beta功能测试，体验 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 公有云版中的最新 AI 功能，并亲身影响即将到来的 AI 功能发布。

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408发布亮点：人工智能与技术创新（AI and Technologies）
entry.content:
人工智能与技术创新在优化业务流程，改进决策支持，提高用户体验方面发挥着关键作用。在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 版本中，人工智能和技术创新将带来众多令人期待的亮点功能，用于提升企业运营效率，改变企业应对复杂商业挑战的方式。

下面让我们看看具体内容。

SAP Joule in S/4HANA Cloud

SAP Joule（以下简称Joule）作为SAP产品的专属AI智能副驾（AI copilot），继在SAP SuccessFactors中发布之后，将在S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408.1版本中全面提供使用。

通过新一代生成AI技术，Joule将会革新用户与SAP 业务系统的交互方式，帮助用户在每个业务接触点开展有效互动，更高效地执行日常任务，从而改变 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 的用户体验。

Joule可以帮助您：

  • 轻松导航到财务，销售，采购，专业服务等应用程序
  • 快速了解业务对象，例如采购订单,采购申请
  • 快速无缝地访问SAP的帮助门户文档信息，并以更清晰简洁的答案进行总结  

用户体验

本次发布引入了个性化用户界面“我的主页”、通过客户应用的使用习惯、地理位置或访问权限，智能推荐主页显示的应用程序，待办事项，预交付卡片等等，并在待办事项部分支持标准和扩展的情况管理提示，进而提升用户体验。

从订单到收款（Order to Cash）的端到端智能流程自动化功能

通过集成各种智能技术和应用程序，为客户打造全方位的端到端自动化，更好地管理订单到收款全流程，实现更加高效、透明和可追溯的业务运营。结合智能化的数据分析和实时监控，企业可以更加准确地把握业务状况，做出更加明智的决策，提高运营效率和盈利能力。

智能场景生命周期管理( ISLM)中的更新

ISLM 是 SAP S/4HANA 堆栈中用于高效集成和操作 AI 场景的统一入口点。它支持客户和合作伙伴管理和使用 SAP 的预构建 AI 场景，或者构建他们的自定义用例。ISLM 包含在 SAP S/4HANA Cloud 的许可中，目前支持超过 25 个 SAP 预构建的智能应用场景。

新功能：一键开启（Turnkey）

在2408版本中ISLM将通过全新的一键开启（Turnkey）功能，进一步自动化AI场景的激活和管理步骤。有别于传统的机器学习开启流程，客户无需具备数据科学家和机器学习的复杂流程知识，通过打开Turnkey开关，即可自动激活用例，避免在初始激活和后续管理中的繁琐操作。此外，系统还可以监控Turnkey的运行状态及其他相关部件。这将大大降低S/4HANA Cloud中AI场景的使用门槛和激活成本。

新技术框架： ISLM 支持生成式 AI （Generative AI）用例

作为管理AI场景的应用程序，ISLM 将与SAP GenAI Hub支持的 LLM 模型无缝集成。客户可以探索使用开箱即用的生成式AI用例，或者选择适合的LLM模型来部署和激活生成式AI的自定义用例。这些智能场景将统一在 ISLM 中进行管理。

另外，2408版本中，ISLM 将提供基本的提示词管理（Prompt management)功能，用于创建、生成和扩展提示词模板。

情况管理（Situation Handling）

在SAP S/4HANA Cloud中，您可以通过使用情况处理来提高业务流程的质量和效率。情况处理可以自动监测和跟踪业务流程节点中发生的问题，需要注意的特殊情况，并通知正确的用户以采取进一步的措施。简而言之，一旦情况发生，用户应该了解情况，自动收到通知。并会获得如何解决问题的建议, 最终帮助业务用户更快地处理和清理这些问题。

新用例 (31N)

在专业服务（professional Service）中用于提醒项目结束日期已到，但阶段仍未完成的项目

SAP 帮助中的新用例清单

New Use Cases for Situation Handling | SAP Help Portal

使用自定义对象创建情况对象

在管理情况对象应用程序中，客户可以使用面向 Eclipse 的 ABAP 开发工具 (ADT)创建自定义SAP对象类型（SAP object types ）和SAP对象节点（SAP object node types ）来创建自定义的情况对象，进而扩展全新的通知场景。

管理情况对象应用程序中的内嵌文本翻译（built-in translation for texts）能将被弃用。

用户可以使用维护翻译(Maintain Translations)应用程序来翻译情况对象、情况场景和情况类型的文本。详情请访问帮助文档

Maintain Translations | SAP Help Portal

更多有关2408中发布功能亮点，请关注Bert Schulze 发表的2408重点发布 博客

或观看我们的 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 2408 早期发布系列回放！

感谢阅读。

entry.title: Re: São Paulo - SAP Stammtisch 8.8.2024 18:00 BRT
entry.content: Perfect! It will be a pleasure be with you guys over there.

entry.title: Re: Activate SNC on AS ABAP
entry.content: 2304831 - Programs fail after CCL 8.5 is installed

entry.title: Re: How to purchase license for single instance of BOBJ
entry.content: They are now selling Bobj through their partner eco-system since the main focus is on SAP Analytics Cloud now. Protiviti is a good partner to use.

entry.title: 特征值创建报错
entry.content: 在S4 环境使用事务码CT04的时候，遇到报错C1 088，【特性名称在保留的名称范围中】。由于该特征值在其他系统也会使用，且特征代码的确定需要多方确认。查询了note没有找到相关信息。希望能拿到一份保留名称的清单，这样在迷命名的时候就可以避免再次遇到这个问题。

entry.title: Model N integration with SAP
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Anybody has experience integrating Model N (modeln.com) to SAP? 

If yes, do you know what SAP notes are useful? Can you also share documentation or blogs?

Hope to hear from you guys.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: WOCR Determination in SAP EWM Based on Specific Requirement- Part 1
entry.content: Thank you for the insightful article—great job! @Arjun_Mukherjee

entry.title: Treasury and Risk Management (TRM / FAM) process and configuration – Example Fixed Term Deposit
entry.content:
Introduction

In this blog, let us start by explaining Treasury Organization and its function with an example of money market instrument which most of us are familiar with i.e., Fixed Term Deposit.

To keep this blog short and precise, in our learning journey we will skip some basic master data e.g., business partners, house bank accounts, etc. Additionally, screen shots are only provided for some important fields.

Treasury Organization and function in transaction manager

Typical treasury organization structure consists of Front office, Middle/Back office and Accounting.

  • Front office: Exercise deals, deal creation, deal and position reporting, limit check, etc.
  • Middle/Back Office: Settlement, matching of deal, netting, correspondence, etc.
  • Accounting:  Payment, period end valuation, accruals, GL postings, etc.

Transactions/Process Steps

Let us consider hypothetical example of fixed term deposit: HK$250 million at interest rate of 4.3% for 15 days start of term 20th April and end of term 05th May. This example will help to demonstrate posting of interest accrual at month end.

Treasury Deals

Deal Creation, Settlement and Display (Transaction code: FTR_CREATE , FTR_EDIT and FTR_DISPLAY)

Structure

Administration

Payment Details

Cash Flow

Position Indicator

Position indicator shows what will be the account assignment reference with further drill down possibilities to Cash Flow item, update type, etc.

Position flows showing Update Type

After approval (or settlement) – Activity is updated as ‘Contract Settlement.’

Events and its Accounting Entries

After deal creation and settlement, fixed term deposit goes through below events which will generate accounting entries. Screen shots are avoided for simplification purpose.

#

Event

Example Date

Description

Example Accounting Entries (with Amount in HKD)

1

Posting flow and generate payment request

20-Apr-24

Transaction code: TBB1

1)     Post flows for asset increase

2)     Generate payment request for paying counter party

 

Dr. Asset/Investment Account – 250,000,000

 

Cr. TRM technical Clearing Account – 250,000,000

 

2

Perform payment (Clear payment request)

20-Apr-24

Transaction code: F111

This will help to create accounting entry for payment

 

Dr. TRM technical Clearing Account – 250,000,000

 

Cr. Outgoing Bank Account – 250,000,000

 

3

Accrual posting at month end

30-Apr-24

Transaction code: TPM44

Accrued revenue for cross month Fixed term deposit. Accrual posting will be posted at month end and reversed in subsequent month.

 

(Interest amount = Principal amount * Interest Rate * Days/366)

(250,000,000 * 4.3% * 11/366 = 323,087.43)

 

 

Dr. Interest Receivables Account – 323,087.43

 

Cr. Interest Income – 323,087.43

(Reversal entry is posted in subsequent month)

 

4

Final repayment, interest income and generate payment request

05-May-24

Transaction code: TBB1

1)     Post flows for repayment of principal amount at time of maturity

2)     Post flow for interest income earned

3)     Generate payment request for incoming payment

 

Principal repayment posting

Dr. TRM technical Clearing Account – 250,000,000

 

Cr. Asset/Investment Account – 250,000,000

 

Interest posting

Dr. TRM technical Clearing Account – 440,573.77

 

Cr. Interest Income – 440,573.77

 

5

Post incoming payment (Clear payment request)

05-May-24

Transaction code: F111

This will help to create accounting entry for incoming payment.

 

Dr. Incoming Bank Account - 250,440,573.77

 

Cr. TRM technical Clearing Account - 250,440,573.77

 

 

Important Configuration

For keeping blog precise, only important configuration is shown here. Additionally, configuration (SPRO) path is not repeated multiple time. Below is the common path for TRM Money market configuration: -

SAP Customizing Implementation Guide -> Financial Supply Chain Management -> Treasury and Risk Management -> Transaction Manager -> Money Market  -> Transaction Management.

Product Type

Field/settings

Description

Product category

The product category is an internal key for financial instruments and predefined in the system. It controls the processing of the financial instruments for product types.

Default value for transaction

1)     Interest Calculation Method which is ‘Procedure for counting the days for the interest calculation.’ when deal is created.

2)     Effective Interest Calculation: This includes effective interest method and calculation type.

3)     Facility: - indicates whether the facility is a bilateral (single bank) or syndicated facility (several bank).

 

Transaction Type

Examples of transaction types: Investment, Borrowing, Purchase, Sale

 

Field/settings

Description

Transaction Category

Categories of transactions that can be carried out with a certain product category. Transaction categories are predefined in the system

Number Range Assignments

 

Self-explanatory

Processing

1)     Sequence of processing the deal e.g., Order – Contract – Settlement

2)     Automatic posting release

3)     Automatic Settlement for Counter confirmation

Flow Type

Flows describe various payment flows arising from financial transaction. Possible flow types include interest rates, repayments, principal increases, and commissions.

Flow type is assigned to Product Type and Transaction Type.

 

Field/settings

Description

Classification

Such as Structure Characteristics, Accrual/deferral, Valuation or Transfer

Flow Category

Used by the system to interpret the concrete business management significance of flows and conditions

Relevance setting

Cash Management, Position, Valuation, Posting, P/L and Accrual/Deferral

Payment management

Outgoing and incoming payments or defaulting individual payment

Update Types and Assign Usages

Update types carry information about flows to accounting and the securities and futures account management of the Transaction Manager.

Update types are assigned to usage which is required for managing positions or for which specific information may have to be defined for account management.

Assign Flow Type to Update Type

Condition Types and Assign condition type to transaction type

Interest, repayment, or commission are examples of condition types.

Condition types automatically generate flows which are the basis for further processing in FI and Cash management as well as for analysis in Market risk management. Assign a classification, a condition category, and a flow type in condition type.

Assign General Valuation Class – MM Transactions

Valuation class will be defaulted based on company code, product type and transaction type when creating financial transaction (aka deals).

Account determination

SPRO Path: Treasury and Risk Management -> Transaction Manager  -> General Settings  -> Accounting -> Link to Other Accounting Components…

GL posting is derived with below: -

  • Update Type is mapped to Posting Specs
  • Posting specs has document type, posting key, account symbols
  • Account symbols is mapped to Account assignment reference and GL account
  • Account assignment reference Is derived
    • Using rule e.g., combination of product category, product type, financial transaction, portfolio, etc.
    • Direct Move
    • Enhancement

Define Account Assignment Reference Determination (OTC Transactions)

Additional Account Assignments

Example profit center

Allocate Additional Account Assignments to Account Assignment References

Define Account Determination

Posting specification

Assign GL account to Account symbols

Assign Update Types for Accrual/Deferral

Conclusion

Hope after reading this blog, you got information on TRM process steps, accounting entries, important configuration. There are multiple treasury instruments and it can be mapped in the system by relating it with basics such as inflow/outflow of cash, asset or liability, business partner involved (counter party), income/expense, valuation, etc.

Disclaimer

This blog post is my opinion and not linked to any organization. All screen shots are from test systems and any similarity is coincidence.
